subcodes.first_line: Verily, the Tongue in the Kingdom of Utterance calleth all unto the Most Exalted Horizon, the Station wherein it speaketh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان اللسان فی ملکوت البیان یدع الکل الی الافق الاعلی المقام الذی فیه تنطق
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
